examples: It's quicker to cut and paste than to retype.
Professor Johnson, last night when I was putting the finishing touches on my paper, a computer failure completely wiped out my files, do you think I can have another day to retype it?
You do not need to retype the full URI many times over throughout the code.
By eliminating the need to retype text from print media onto the screen, Optical Character Reader saves users a great deal of time.
For instance, a user could buy a plane ticket online and then book a hire car without having to sign on again and retype the destination.
